# UZIO Mobile — Comprehensive Sanity Suite
# Platform: both (android / ios)
# Environment: qa (teamadmin) / prod
# Source of element text: UzioMobile src/i18n/locales/en.json (NO testIDs — locate by visible text)
#
# Generated by: Test Generation Agent methodology (.claude/commands/test-generation-agent.md)
# Sanity scope = smoke-test the CRITICAL PATH of every major feature: each screen
# loads/reachable + its primary happy-path action works. Deep edge cases live in regression.
#
# ── Text reconciliation note ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Live QA "teamadmin" build (confirmed working) uses a SINGLE-SCREEN login:
#   button "LOGIN" · placeholder "Username (Email Address)" · "Password"
# Default en.json (other flavors) uses a multi-step login:
#   "Next" → "Submit" · placeholder "Username (Email)"
# Steps below use the LIVE-CONFIRMED text first; alternates noted with ⟂.

---

## COVERAGE TABLE

Legend — Status: ✅ automated & passing · 🟡 spec ready, page object exists · ⬜ spec ready, NEW page object needed
Priority: P1 critical smoke · P2 important · P3 nice-to-have

|------|----------|------|--------|-----|--------|

| MS-16 | Drawer section headers + items visible | Nav | Drawer | P2 | 🟡 |

| MS-21 | Request Time Off flow reachable | Time Off | Time Off | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-22 | Time Off History loads (drawer) | Time Off | Time Off History | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-23 | Holiday Calendar loads (drawer) | Time Off | Holiday Calendar | P3 | ⬜ |

| MS-27 | Benefits — Plan Documents accessible | Benefits | Benefits | P3 | ⬜ |

| MS-29 | Payment Method screen loads (drawer) | Pay | Payment Method | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-30 | W-2 Forms screen loads (drawer) | Pay | W-2 Forms | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-31 | Federal Tax Withholding loads (drawer) | Pay | Federal Tax | P3 | ⬜ |
| MS-32 | My Info / Profile loads (drawer) | Personal | My Info | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-33 | Documents screen loads (drawer) | Personal | Documents | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-34 | Tasks screen loads (Pending/Completed) | Personal | Tasks | P2 | ⬜ |
| MS-35 | Resources screen loads (drawer) | Personal | Resources | P3 | ⬜ |
| MS-36 | Inbox loads (Action Needed / Notifications) | Inbox | Inbox | P1 | ⬜ |
| MS-37 | Team Timesheet loads (manager) | Manager | Team Timesheet | P2 | ⬜ |

Totals: **43 cases** — P1: 11 · P2: 19 · P3: 13 | Implemented & passing: 6 · ready (page object exists): 9 · new page object needed: 28

# ════════════════════ AUTH & APP ENTRY ════════════════════

## MS-01: App Launch & Login Landed  ✅
**What this tests:** App launches, employee is logged in (or logs in), lands on dashboard.
**Precondition:** App installed; session may or may not be active.

#### TEST
dismiss system permissions if present                ← notification/location
dismiss onboarding if present                         ← 3-slide carousel, "Skip"/"Let's Begin"
dismiss App Lock if present: "I'll do it later"
verify "Time Tracking" is visible                     ← default landing tab
screenshot "ms01-logged-in"

---

## MS-02: Login With Valid Credentials (fresh)  🟡
**What this tests:** Logged-out user can authenticate end-to-end.
**Precondition:** Logged OUT (login screen reachable).

#### SETUP
dismiss system permissions if present
dismiss onboarding if present                         ← carousel before login
wait for "LOGIN" to appear                            ⟂ alt: "Next" (multi-step build)

#### TEST
enter username into field[0]                          ← "Username (Email Address)" ⟂ "Username (Email)"
enter password into field[1]                          ← "Password"
tap "LOGIN"                                            ⟂ multi-step: tap "Next" → enter password → tap "Submit"
dismiss App Lock if present: "I'll do it later"
dismiss system permissions if present                 ← location prompt appears post-login
wait for "Time Tracking" to appear
verify "Time Tracking" is visible
screenshot "ms02-authenticated"

---

## MS-05: Login Validation — Empty Email  🟡
**What this tests:** Submitting with no email is blocked with a message.
**Precondition:** On login screen, email field empty.

#### TEST
clear field[0]
tap "LOGIN"
verify "Please enter your e-mail to continue" is visible   ⟂ build-specific copy
screenshot "ms05-empty-email"

---

## MS-06: Login Validation — Empty Password  🟡
**What this tests:** Submitting with no password is blocked with a message.
**Precondition:** On login screen, email entered, password empty.

#### TEST
enter username into field[0]
clear field[1]
tap "LOGIN"
verify "Please enter your password to continue" is visible
screenshot "ms06-empty-password"

---

## MS-07: Login — Invalid Credentials Error  🟡
**What this tests:** Wrong credentials show the incorrect-credentials error.
**Precondition:** On login screen.

#### TEST
enter "wrong@t.com" into field[0]
enter "WrongPass123" into field[1]
tap "LOGIN"
verify "The username or password is incorrect." is visible
screenshot "ms07-invalid-creds"

---

## MS-08: Forgot Password Reachable  🟡
**What this tests:** Forgot-password entry point is present and tappable.
**Precondition:** On login screen.

#### TEST
verify "Forgot Password?" is visible
tap "Forgot Password?"
screenshot "ms08-forgot-password"

---

## MS-11: Onboarding Carousel  🟡
**What this tests:** First-launch carousel shows 3 slides and can be dismissed to login.
**Precondition:** Fresh launch showing carousel (slide 1 "Benefits").

#### TEST
verify "Benefits" is visible                          ← slide 1 heading
verify "Skip" is visible
[option A] tap "Skip"                                 ← jumps straight to login
[option B] swipe left → "Payroll" → swipe left → "Time Tracking" → tap "Let's Begin"
wait for "LOGIN" to appear
screenshot "ms11-carousel-dismissed"

---

## MS-13: System Permission Dialogs  🟡
**What this tests:** OS notification/location prompts are handled, not blocking the app.
**Precondition:** Fresh install launch (Android 13+ notification prompt).

#### TEST
dismiss system permissions if present: "Allow" / "While using the app"
verify "LOGIN" is visible OR "Time Tracking" is visible
screenshot "ms13-permissions-cleared"

---

## MS-14: App Lock Prompt Dismiss  ✅*
**What this tests:** Post-login "Enable App Lock" prompt is dismissable via "I'll do it later".
**Precondition:** Just authenticated (prompt appears).

#### TEST
verify "Enable App Lock" is visible
tap "I'll do it later"                                 ← matched via contains("do it later")
verify "Time Tracking" is visible
screenshot "ms14-applock-dismissed"

---

# ════════════════════ NAVIGATION ════════════════════

## MS-03: Bottom Navigation  ✅
**What this tests:** Feature-gated bottom tabs are reachable.
**Precondition:** Logged in. NOTE: tabs are feature-flagged; no Home/Profile tab.

#### TEST
tap "Time Tracking"
wait for "Time Tracking" to appear
tap "Benefits" if present
tap "Schedule" if present
tap "Time Off" if present
tap "Inbox" if present
tap "Time Tracking"                                    ← return to landing
screenshot "ms03-nav"

---

## MS-15: Drawer Opens  ✅*
**What this tests:** Side drawer opens from the hamburger icon (top-left, no text label).
**Precondition:** Logged in, on a main tab.

#### TEST
open drawer                                            ← tap hamburger 'menu-sharp' (~11% width, 10% height)
verify "Logout" is visible OR "My Timesheet" is visible OR "Pay Stubs" is visible
screenshot "ms15-drawer-open"

---

## MS-16: Drawer Sections & Items  🟡
**What this tests:** Drawer renders its section headers and items.
**Precondition:** Drawer open.

#### TEST
open drawer
verify "Time Tracking" is visible                      ← user/landing context in header
scroll to "Logout"
[verify any visible] "Team Timesheet" / "My Timesheet" / "Time Off History" /
                     "Holiday Calendar" / "Pay Stubs" / "W-2 Forms" /
                     "Payment Method" / "Federal Tax Withholding" /
                     "Documents" / "Tasks" / "Contact Support" / "Logout"
screenshot "ms16-drawer-items"

---

# ════════════════════ TIME TRACKING ════════════════════

## MS-04: Time Tracking Screen  ✅
**What this tests:** Clock In or Clock Out control is present on the Time Tracking screen.
**Precondition:** Logged in.

#### TEST
tap "Time Tracking"
verify "Clock In" is visible OR "Clock Out" is visible
screenshot "ms04-time-tracking"

---

## MS-09: Clock In  ✅
**What this tests:** Employee can clock in; clocked-in state confirmed.
**Precondition:** Employee clocked OUT.

#### SETUP
tap "Time Tracking"
[if "Clock Out" visible → clock out first to reset]

#### TEST
tap "Clock In"
dismiss popup if present: "Close"                      ← "You are Clocked In" modal
wait for "Clocked In" OR "Clock Out" to appear
verify clocked in
screenshot "ms09-clocked-in"

#### TEARDOWN
tap "Clock Out"
dismiss attestation if present
dismiss popup if present: "Close"

---

## MS-10: Clock Out (with attestation)  ✅
**What this tests:** Employee can clock out, including the missed-break attestation modal.
**Precondition:** Employee clocked IN.

#### TEST
tap "Time Tracking"
tap "Clock Out"
dismiss attestation if present:                        ← "Time Attestation" / "Missed Break Attestation"
    check "I have reviewed my time and confirm it is complete and accurate."
    select "Yes, I had the opportunity, but I freely choose not to take this break."
    tap "Save and Clock Out"
dismiss popup if present: "Close"                      ← "You are Clocked Out" modal
wait for "Clock In" to appear
verify clocked out
screenshot "ms10-clocked-out"

---

## MS-17: Break Time  ⬜  (needs TimeTrackingPage.start_break / end_break)
**What this tests:** Employee on the clock can start and end a break.
**Precondition:** Employee clocked IN.

#### TEST
tap "Time Tracking"
tap "Break Time"
dismiss popup if present: "Close"                      ← "You are on Break"
verify "End Break" is visible OR "You are on Break" is visible
tap "End Break"
dismiss popup if present: "Close"                      ← "Break has Ended"
screenshot "ms17-break-cycle"

---

## MS-18: Add Time Entry Screen  ⬜
**What this tests:** Add-time-entry screen opens.
**Precondition:** On Time Tracking screen.

#### TEST
tap "Time Tracking"
tap "Add Time Entry"
verify "Add Time Entry" is visible
press back
screenshot "ms18-add-entry"

---

**What this tests:** My Timesheet screen loads from the drawer.

scroll to "My Timesheet"

# ════════════════════ SESSION ════════════════════

## MS-12: Logout  ✅
**What this tests:** Employee can log out via the hamburger drawer.
**Precondition:** Logged in. NOTE: post-logout returns to onboarding carousel, then login.

#### TEST
open drawer                                            ← hamburger top-left
scroll to "Logout"
tap "Logout"
dismiss popup if present: "Yes" / "Confirm"            ← confirmation (build-dependent)
dismiss onboarding if present                          ← carousel reappears after logout
wait for "LOGIN" to appear
screenshot "ms12-logged-out"

---

## MS-41: Company Switch  ⬜  (multi-company users)
**What this tests:** Users linked to multiple companies can switch from the drawer header.
**Precondition:** Logged in, user linked to 2+ companies.

#### TEST
open drawer
tap company name dropdown                              ← drawer header (employerName)
verify a second company option is visible
press back
screenshot "ms41-company-switch"

---

## MS-42: Session Persistence  🟡
**What this tests:** With no_reset, relaunch keeps the user logged in.
**Precondition:** Logged in once.

#### TEST
[relaunch app via driver — handled by fixture with no_reset=true]
dismiss App Lock if present: "I'll do it later"
dismiss system permissions if present
verify "Time Tracking" is visible                      ← straight to dashboard, no login
screenshot "ms42-session-persisted"

---

# ════════════════════ RESILIENCE ════════════════════

## MS-43: Offline / No Internet  ⬜
**What this tests:** App surfaces a graceful no-internet message rather than crashing.
**Precondition:** Logged in. Toggle airplane mode / disable network (manual or driver).

#### TEST
[disable network]
tap "Clock In"
verify "No Internet. Please try again later." is visible OR "No Internet Connection" is visible
[re-enable network]
screenshot "ms43-offline"

---

# ── NEXT STEPS (automation) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# To automate the ⬜ cases, add page objects (Step 4 of test-generation-agent):
#   pages/time_off_page.py        (exists — extend for MS-20/21)
#   pages/benefits_page.py        (MS-26/27)
#   pages/schedule_page.py        (MS-24/25)
#   pages/pay_page.py             (MS-28..31 — Pay Stubs/Payment/W-2/Federal Tax)
#   pages/drawer_nav.py           (MS-19/22/23/32..35/37..40 — generic "open drawer → scroll to X → tap")
#   pages/inbox_page.py           (MS-36)
#   pages/profile_page.py         (MS-32)
# And add the matching text constants to core/locators.py (values listed inline above).
# SECURITY: MS-29 (Payment Method) and MS-31 (Federal Tax) must NEVER enter real
# bank/routing/SSN data — sanity only verifies the screen LOADS.
